markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to discuss GrowthX's AI content services for Federato.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Federato's Need:** A solo content team requires scalable, high-quality content to support a Series D expansion. Current AI-generated content is unengaging and fails to convert.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A hybrid AI/human model producing 5 articles/week focused on SEO/GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This aims for non-branded traffic and AI answer box placement.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Engagement Model:** An 8-week, $30–40k strategy sprint (delivering 5–10 articles) precedes a 12-month retainer. The retainer starts at $15k/mo for editorial, with programmatic add-ons at $9–15k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Tyler will send examples and resources. Jenn will review for budget planning and may include the CMO in a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

## Topics

### Federato's Content Challenge

  - [**Context:** A recent $100M Series D funding round is driving product line expansion and a need to scale content operations.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Team:** The content team is shrinking to a single person (Jenn), creating a capacity gap.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Current AI Use:** A custom GPT generates content, but it lacks engagement, thought leadership, and conversion power.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Audience:** P\&C insurance carriers and MGAs.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Focus Shift:** Expanding beyond the underwriter persona to cover the full policy lifecycle (claims, billing, distribution).](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Competition:** Guidewire (primary), Duck Creek, Vertifore, Majesco.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Engine

  - [**Service:** An end-to-end partner for SEO and GEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [**GEO:** Optimizing content for AI search engines (e.g., Google's SGE) to secure answer box placement.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Output:** 5 articles per week, with full staging and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [**Analytics:** LLM visibility monitoring (tracking prompts, topics, and competitive performance).](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Process:** A hybrid model combining sophisticated AI workflows with expert human oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Context Engineering:** Ingests client artifacts (brand guides, ICPs, battle cards) to train the LLM, ensuring on-brand, audience-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Automatically refreshes content every 3 months to maintain currency.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Grew organic traffic \~3x in one year by owning the enterprise AI coding space.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Lovable:** Built a programmatic templates library, creating hundreds of SEO-optimized pages that also serve as product entry points.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Created a programmatic vendor directory using internal spend data, establishing Ramp as an authority on business spending.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Engagement Model & Pricing

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Duration:** 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Cost:** $30k–$40k](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** 5–10 articles and a full content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A low-risk trial to demonstrate quality and align on strategy before a long-term commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Retainer**](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [**Editorial:** Starts at $15k/month for 5 articles/week, scaling up to $18k/month for more volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [**Programmatic Add-ons:** Custom projects (e.g., templates, directories) start at $9k–$15k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [**Scope Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [**In-Scope:** Top/middle-funnel guides, competitive takedown campaigns, and product-specific deep dives.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [**Out-of-Scope:** Projects requiring original data collection (e.g., surveys for an annual report).](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send content examples and resources to Jenn.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Review materials for budget planning; may include the CMO in a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/Tg_Y_ydoz2WSKKUhzsdyNXVTqcq6y4pK?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
